    Baptiste Gregorutti

    Head of Data Science at SCAI – Sorbonne Center for AI. Research engineer, educator, and team lead.

    • Paris, France
    • SCAI – Sorbonne Université
    • Email
    • GitHub
    • LinkedIn

    Research Projects

    These are the main data science and AI projects I led or contributed to at SCAI – Sorbonne Center for Artificial Intelligence (2023–present). Each project is a collaboration between SCAI’s data science team and one or more research labs from Sorbonne University and its partners.

    Digital Delacroix

    Published: March 22, 2026

    Computer vision applied to art history — digitising and analysing the complete works of Eugène Delacroix.

    Cowspiracy

    Published: March 22, 2026

    Computer vision for large-scale animal detection to monitor soil erosion and land degradation in Senegal and the Gobi Desert.

    Annotix

    Published: March 22, 2026

    Graph machine learning and molecular networking to annotate unknown molecules from LC-MS/MS spectra in metabolomics.

    Sorbobot

    Published: March 22, 2026

    An LLM-based system for mapping and surfacing expertise across Sorbonne University using retrieval-augmented generation.
